name: automations-nodejs
description: Node.js automation services — Telegram bot, cache warmer, WhatsApp bot

scripts.status: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=fs.existsSync('cache-warmer-progress.json')?JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('cache-warmer-progress.json','utf8')):null;const s=fs.existsSync('cache-warmer-last-run.json')?JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('cache-warmer-last-run.json','utf8')):null;console.log('');console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════════');console.log('           CACHE WARMER — STATUS           ');console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════════');if(p&&p.running){console.log('  Status:     ● RUNNING');console.log('  Started:   ',p.started);console.log('  Progress:  ',p.current+'/'+p.total+' URLs ('+(p.current/p.total*100).toFixed(0)+'%)');const elapsed=(new Date(p.updated)-new Date(p.started))/1000;const rate=elapsed/p.current;const remaining=(p.total-p.current)*rate;console.log('  Elapsed:   ',(elapsed/60).toFixed(1),'min');console.log('  ETA:       ~'+(remaining/60).toFixed(1),'min remaining');if(p.lastUrl)console.log('  Last URL:  ',p.lastUrl.substring(0,80)+(p.lastUrl.length>80?'...':''));}else{console.log('  Status:     ○ IDLE (no warmer running)');}console.log('');if(s){console.log('  Last run:  ',s.started,'→',s.finished);console.log('  Total:     ',s.total,'URLs');console.log('  Successful:',s.successful,'| Failed:',s.failed);if(s.kinsta)console.log('  Kinsta:    ',s.kinsta.hit||0,'HIT,',s.kinsta.miss||0,'MISS,',s.kinsta.bypass||0,'BYPASS');if(s.cdn)console.log('  CDN:       ',s.cdn.hit||0,'HIT,',s.cdn.miss||0,'MISS,',s.cdn.bypass||0,'BYPASS');if(s.edge)console.log('  Edge:      ',s.edge.hit||0,'HIT,',s.edge.miss||0,'MISS,',s.edge.bypass||0,'BYPASS');}else{console.log('  Last run:   No completed runs yet');}console.log('');console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════════');console.log('');"
scripts.logs: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='./cache-warmer-last-run.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('No warmer runs yet.');process.exit(0);}const s=require(p);console.log('Last run:', s.started, '→', s.finished);console.log('Total:', s.total, '| OK:', s.successful, '| Failed:', s.failed);if(s.statusCodes){console.log('Status codes:', JSON.stringify(s.statusCodes));}console.log('Kinsta:', JSON.stringify(s.kinsta));console.log('CDN:', JSON.stringify(s.cdn));console.log('Edge:', JSON.stringify(s.edge));if(s.redirectUrls&&s.redirectUrls.length){console.log('Redirects:');s.redirectUrls.forEach(r=>console.log('  ↳', r.from, '→', r.to));}if(s.unknowns&&s.unknowns.length){console.log('Other responses:');s.unknowns.forEach(u=>console.log('  '+u.header+': '+u.value+' — '+u.url));}if(s.failedUrls&&s.failedUrls.length){console.log('Failed URLs:');s.failedUrls.forEach(f=>console.log('  ✗', f.url, '-', f.error));}"
